# UC-17.5.5 · Forcepoint Remote Browser Isolation Session Audit (`forcepoint:one`)

## Description

Isolation contains risky clicks; auditing sessions proves the control ran for regulated user populations.

## Value

Demonstrates compensating controls for PCI and ISO browser-security objectives.

## Implementation

Install the Insights SIEM app, configure HEC inputs per product line, and align indexes (`proxy`, `email`, `dlp`, `sase`). Normalize usernames to enterprise SAMAccountName.

## SPL

```spl
index=sase sourcetype="forcepoint:one" earliest=-24h
| where match(lower(event_type),"(?i)isolation|rbi|remote browser")
| stats count by user, url_host, action
| sort -count
```

## CIM SPL

```spl
| tstats `summariesonly` count
  from datamodel=Email.Email
  by Email.user, Email.action, Email.src, Email.dest span=1h
| sort - count
```

## Visualization

Table (user, host), timechart.

- [Splunkbase — Forcepoint Insights SIEM App](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/8053)
